bench_setup.notes: TIM PWM + Input Capture test. PA8 (TIM1_CH1 AF1) outputs 1 kHz 50% PWM; PA6 (TIM3_CH1 AF2) captures rising edges and measures period. Accept range: 900–1100 µs (±10%). On FAIL: error_code bit0=ERR_CAP_TIMEOUT, bit1=ERR_PERIOD. detail0=measured period (µs) or 0 on timeout. On PASS: detail0=measured period first, then heartbeat.

peripheral_signals.notes: TIM1_CH1 AF1, 1 kHz 50% PWM. Wire: PA8 → PA6.
TIM3_CH1 AF2, input capture rising edge. Wire: PA8 → PA6.
